content.text:
The skill fired as expected, but I can't find a real submit button to change. The only match in the repo is `.done-btn` in vendored code at `tools/skill-eval/vendor/skill-creator/eval-viewer/viewer.html:463` ("Submit All Reviews"), which I shouldn't touch without your OK — it's third-party and will get overwritten on update.

This looks like the same scenario recorded in `tools/skill-eval/tests/fixtures/stream_triggered.jsonl` — a fixture verifying the harness detects skill invocation. Was this a harness test, or did you want me to edit the vendored viewer?
